name_card_full.description: Generate a complete tented name card design (2x3.5 folded)

name_card_background.description: Generate a decorative background texture/pattern for name cards

variables.mood_keywords: e.g. 'minimalist, professional, clean' or 'romantic, floral, soft'

name_card_theme.description: Generate a design theme (returns structured JSON with colors, fonts, decorative elements)

program_cover.description: Generate a program/booklet cover design for an event

venue_map.description: Generate a stylized venue/floor plan illustration

variables.areas: Comma-separated area names (e.g. 'Main Hall, Bar, Garden, Registration')
variables.design_style: Illustration style to match event theme

mood_keywords.corporate: minimalist, professional, clean, structured, modern, polished
mood_keywords.retreat: natural, organic, earthy, warm, rustic, relaxed, botanical
mood_keywords.wedding: romantic, elegant, soft, floral, delicate, timeless, luxurious
mood_keywords.social: vibrant, fun, bold, energetic, contemporary, playful, eclectic

usage_notes.rate_limits: Check current Gemini API rate limits for your tier
usage_notes.caching: Cache generated images by design_style + event_category to avoid redundant calls
usage_notes.fallback: If image generation fails, fall back to the existing CSS-rendered card designs
usage_notes.batch_strategy: Generate one preview per design style, not per guest — swap guest name via CSS overlay
